title: Stilifolium stipitatum
intro: Unfortunately, I was unable to locate any information on Stilifolium stipitatum.
taxonomy: Stilifolium stipitatum is classified within the family Caryophyllaceae, which is a family of flowering plants commonly known as the pink or carnation family. This family is further grouped into the order Caryophyllales. The order Caryophyllales is part of the clade Asterids, which is one of the two main clades of flowering plants. The clade Asterids is also known as the Syringales. The classification of Stilifolium stipitatum is still under research and may be subject to change.
